events.description:

Freehand Art Supply
Philadelphia, PA

Join us for a Thursday Night Art Club - Open Studio!
It's free to join, just BYO something to work on. No instruction provided, just a chance to work with others and get inspired.
We will provide:
Basics like easels, paint cups, palettes
Some limited materials if needed, like surfaces, brushes, paints, water jars, etc
Space to hang out!




Our (mostly) free and (mostly) weekly Art Clubs aim to offer the community a third space where people can meet and socialize while working on a rotating low-stress artsy activity. Subscribe to the calendar to find our full and updating event list at…

Hosted by Freehand Art Supply

events.title: PATCH 002: TAP IN NFC LAB
events.venue: Pennovation Center, 3401 Grays Ferry Ave, Philadelphia, PA 19146, USA
events.description:
Get up-to-date information at: https://luma.com/p30z896q

Address:
Pennovation Center
Philadelphia, PA
United States

You tap your phone against things all day. A card reader, a poster, another phone. Most people never stop to ask what is actually happening in that half second. We are going to show you, and then you are going to build with it.

PATCH 002: NFC LAB is a hands-on night built around one small piece of technology (NFC) that turns out to do a lot more than you think.

Here is how the night goes. You start by reading tags already hidden around the room, just to see the range of what a tap can trigger. Then you write your first one: a link, a contact card, your WiFi password, whatever you want…

Hosted by Waskar Paulino
